content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom O:24 in the molecule. Looking at the image, I can see that atom O:24 (oxygen) is directly bonded to:

1. C:25 (carbon) - connected via a red bond
2. C:22 (carbon) - connected via a red bond

The bonds are clearly visible as red connections between O:24 and these two carbon atoms. There are no other atoms directly bonded to O:24 in this view.

Let me confirm the geomconf_index for this molecule. Based on the file name "geomconf_3765.xyz", the geomconf_index appears to be 3765.

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 24 (O) are:
- Atom index 25, element C (carbon)
- Atom index 22, element C (carbon)

Geomconf_index: 3765

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 24, whose element should be O. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
